rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the premature Layer 5/6 material and `True` placeholder classes visible in the diff, but Review 2 also flags the concrete bundling of finite type and geometric reducedness in `AffineAlgGroup`, which would materially narrow the foundation if the cited roadmap directive is accurate. Acting on Review 2 would therefore leave a better-scoped PR: remove the premature endpoints and avoid over-bundling the remaining foundation.
